notice: All episodes, quotations, prices, recommendations, and processing outcomes in this file are synthetic test data.

episodes.title: [SYNTHETIC] MTG Fast Finance Ep 901: Fetchland Signals
episodes.mock_transcript: Synthetic transcript fixture. At 00:31:10 the hosts begin Cards to Watch and discuss four fictional recommendations. No statement here represents a real host or real financial advice.

recommendations.recommendation: Watch nonfoil copies and consider entering only near the stated floor.
reasoning: Synthetic supply is described as stabilizing.
The fixture assumes enduring demand from multiple formats.
caveats: A broad fetchland reprint would undermine the thesis.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: I only want these if they settle into that thirteen-to-fifteen range.

recommendations.recommendation: Hold existing copies; do not chase a short-term increase.
recommendations.hold: Until the next major reprint announcement
reasoning: The fixture describes persistent Commander demand.
caveats: Printing was inferred from context and should be reviewed.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: I am holding mine, but I would not buy this spike.

recommendations.recommendation: Avoid buying until tournament demand is visible again.
reasoning: The synthetic discussion says current demand is speculative rather than demonstrated.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: Under four is interesting, but I need to see the deck first.

recommendations.recommendation: Watch premium copies rather than treating every printing alike.
reasoning: The synthetic thesis separates premium collector demand from regular copies.
caveats: The exact showcase treatment is deliberately ambiguous in this fixture.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: The special frame is the one I mean, but verify which version before acting.

episodes.title: [SYNTHETIC] MTG Fast Finance Ep 902: Commander Reprint Windows
episodes.mock_transcript: Synthetic transcript fixture with a clearly marked Cards to Watch section beginning at 00:28:40.

recommendations.recommendation: Wait for the premium treatment to fall before considering an entry.
reasoning: The synthetic thesis expects collector demand after initial supply clears.
caveats: Another premium reprint could cap the exit.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: Twenty-two is where the risk starts to look acceptable to me.

recommendations.recommendation: Take profit into strength rather than opening a new position.
reasoning: The fixture describes the price as having moved ahead of proven demand.
caveats: A major tournament result could extend the move.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: I am a seller into sixty-five or seventy, not a buyer here.

recommendations.recommendation: Accumulate slowly if copies reach the entry range.
reasoning: Synthetic Commander demand is broad across creature types.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: I can start buying at twenty, but this is not a quick flip.

recommendations.recommendation: Avoid financial exposure until reprint policy is clearer.
reasoning: The synthetic discussion identifies reprint uncertainty as dominant.
recommendations.evidence_excerpt: Synthetic quote: There is no number for me until we understand the reprint path.

reasoning: The synthetic thesis cites multi-format utility and premium art demand.

recommendations.recommendation: Do not buy solely on the synthetic metagame rumor.

episodes.title: [SYNTHETIC] MTG Fast Finance Ep 905: Repeat Recommendation Test

recommendations.recommendation: The earlier watch has reached its synthetic entry range; accumulate cautiously.

recommendations.recommendation: Continue watching; the prior synthetic entry has not been reached.
